creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
1. Forgot that I opened another similar PR (ports/164390) -- you might want to dupe this to that PR.
	2. This patch doesn't work in all cases (in particular if the dependent package wasn't pre-installed).
	3. Running make package for the leaf package instead of running it for the dependent packages first opens up an interesting can of worms in build environments if I could create a leaf package, but not the dependent ones (which is what I'm running into right now in my workspace).
Thanks!
-Garrett
